plugin.name: Alt Text Generator
plugin.description: Generate alt text for images on upload via OpenAI.
page.title: Alt Text Generator
page.subtitle: Generate accessible alt text for images that are missing one.
page.column.name: File
settings.title: Alt Text Generator
settings.subtitle: Configure the alt text generator.
settings.openai.missing: OPENAI_API_KEY is not set in the Strapi environment. Set it in .env and restart Strapi.
settings.language.label: Language
settings.language.hint: Language alt text should be written in (e.g. English, Deutsch, Français).
settings.autoGenerate.label: Auto-generate on upload
settings.autoGenerate.hint: When enabled, alt text is generated automatically for new image uploads that don't already have one.
